name: a rule the native enforcer cannot deterministically judge surfaces not_enforced rather than a silent green
command: printf '%s\n' 'rules:' '  - id: scraped-idempotency' '    description: "database migration scripts must implement idempotency safeguards thoroughly"' '    severity: P1' '    applies: "*.sql"' '    enforced_by: [{tool: sqlfluff}]' > i.yaml && printf 'ALTER TABLE accounts ADD COLUMN idempotency_token TEXT;\n' > m.sql && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file m.sql --extra-rules i.yaml >/dev/null 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 3 ] && grep -q 'rule=scraped-idempotency detector=prose-judge.sh verdict=not_enforced' e.txt && echo honest-floor-not-silent 1>&2
